news_items.headline: Series Preview: Will the A’s finish with a better record than the Giants?
news_items.summary: It was only last August when I assured everyone that the Giants would finish ahead of the Athletics, but it would probably be close. That didn’t wind up being the case, as the Giants got to 81 wins compared to teh A’s 76, but there’s something interesting about going back and reading through some of […]
